You are building a production-grade GitHub Analytics Dashboard called "FlowForge".

Tech Stack:

- Frontend: React (Vite) + TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS + CSS Modules only
- Charts: Recharts
- Backend: Node.js + Express + TypeScript
- Data Source: GitHub GraphQL API

Architecture Rules:

- Use modular, reusable components
- Use strict separation of concerns (UI, hooks, services)
- Backend is the single source of truth
- Use clean, scalable folder structure
- Avoid inline styles, use CSS modules
- Use async/await with proper error handling
- Use loading and error states in UI

UI Style:

- Minimal, modern (Linear/Vercel inspired)
- Glassmorphism cards
- Subtle hover effects
- Clean typography

Goal:
Build a dashboard that tracks:

- GitHub activity
- Repo velocity
- Issue throughput
- Contributor insights
